name: Grilled Turkey En Brochette
recipeIngredient: 1 large Green pepper, seeded and cut into eighths
recipeInstructions: Cut the turkey steaks into 2-inch cubes and place in a bowl. Combine the chili sauce, lemon juice, sugar, and bay leaves in a separate container. Pour the mixture over the turkey cubes, ensuring they are well coated. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally to coat all the cubes. Thread the turkey onto skewers, alternating with tomatoes, mushrooms, green pepper pieces, onion quarters, and zucchini slices. Brush lightly with oil before grilling. Grill over hot coals, turning occasionally, for about 10 to 15 minutes total. Brush with the reserved marinade while turning. Makes 4 servings.
